attributes.description: Mahindra Logistics Ltd is an integrated logistics & mobility solutions provider. The company offers Supply Chain expertise to diverse industry verticals such as Automotive, Engineering, Consumer Goods, Pharmaceuticals, Telecommunications, Commodities, and E-commerce. [1]
